title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Running Club
questions.text: Running club will not train on the track today because a football match is taking place there. Meet outside the sports hall at 4 p.m. for a shorter run around the park.
questions.question: What should running club members do?

options.C: Meet somewhere else for a different route.
options.A: Join the football match on the track.
options.B: Train on the track after the match.

questions.explanation: They should meet outside the sports hall and run around the park.

questions.heading: Message from Zoe to Liam
questions.text: Liam, I’ve seen the shoes you wanted in the sale, but only in black. They’re much cheaper than last week. Do you want me to buy them, or should I wait for the blue ones?
questions.question: Why is Zoe texting Liam?

options.A: To ask him to choose between price and colour.
options.B: To say the shoes are no longer available.
options.C: To tell him blue shoes are cheaper now.

questions.explanation: Zoe asks whether Liam wants the cheaper black shoes or wants to wait.

questions.heading: Computer Club
questions.text: Computer club members should save their work online before Friday. The old computers will be replaced during the weekend, and anything saved only on those machines may be lost.
questions.question: What does the notice warn members?

options.B: They should protect their work before the computers change.
options.A: They cannot use online storage after Friday.
options.C: The club will stop meeting at weekends.

questions.explanation: Members need to save work online so it is not lost.

questions.heading: From: Mr Lewis / Subject: Music homework
questions.text: Your recordings were good, but several people forgot to say their names at the start. Please upload a new version only if your name is missing. Everyone else can leave their work as it is.
questions.question: Who needs to upload their work again?

options.C: Students who did not introduce themselves.
options.A: Students who dislike their own recordings.
options.B: Everyone who completed the music homework.

questions.explanation: Only students whose names are missing must upload a new version.

questions.heading: Camping Stove
questions.text: Use this stove outside only and keep it away from tents. Wait until it is completely cool before packing it away. Children should not use the stove without adult help.
questions.question: What does the label warn users about?

options.A: They must use the stove safely outdoors.
options.B: They should pack the stove while hot.
options.C: Children can use the stove alone.

questions.explanation: The label gives safety rules for using the stove outside.
